global.description: The ad features a bright blue background with engaging text and gameplay elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to engage with the game and shop for bonuses.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: IronQuest BONUS
elements.description: A bold, uppercase text in a bright color, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Shop now
elements.description: A clear, inviting button with a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Level up today
elements.description: A large, friendly font that conveys excitement, positioned centrally in the ad.

elements.label: Play with friends tonight
elements.description: A smaller, inviting text that complements the main message, located just below the headline.

elements.label: Gameplay preview
elements.description: A grid layout showing four game icons, suggesting gameplay elements, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Icon placeholder
elements.description: A small circular icon placeholder, visually representing a game element.
